items.claim: Kevin Borjas has a history of being taken down in the UFC.
items.quote: I've seen him get taken down in the UFC.

items.claim: Andre Lima will outstrike Kevin Borjas.
items.quote: I think he's going to get outstruck by Andre Lima.

items.claim: Andre Lima has the ability to quickly return to his feet after being taken down.
items.quote: Andre Lima is just going to be able to bounce back up.

items.claim: Manel Kape is more damaging than Kyoji Horiguchi.
items.quote: Manel Kape seems to be the more damaging of the two

items.claim: Kyoji Horiguchi controls pace and range better than Manel Kape.
items.quote: Kyoji Horiguchi seems to control the pace and the range a little bit better.

items.claim: Justin Gaethje's large physical size for the lightweight division was a key factor in his win over Ilia Topuria.
items.quote: I think that was a you know, that was a key detail here

items.claim: Justin Gaethje possesses the durability to absorb high-impact strikes that have finished other opponents.
items.quote: a massive massive piece of this puzzle was the ability of Justin Gaethje to absorb shots of Ilia Topuria cuz Ilia Topuria hit him with 20 knockout shots, right? That put a lot of people down. And and Justin Gaethje ate all 20.

items.claim: Ilia Topuria's failure to finish Justin Gaethje from mount was due to poor energy management and indecision.
items.quote: Part of that seemed to be energy management. Part of that seemed to be the indecision of do I want submission, do I want TKO?
